name: Ra’uf Nebetahotep Amenemhat | EGYPTIAN PRINCE
description:
. ݁₊ ⊹ . [M4A] .ᐟ
🏜️ ! Ra’uf was upset but met the new gardener while in the garden.

˚ · . Ra’uf was having a pretty normal day. He was eating breakfast with his family, until his parents decided to spring the news that he was to be engaged to a princess — whom he had no idea about — and of course he was sent into a fit of anger and shock. He decided to try and cool himself off by going to the garden, which he had recently taken quite a liking to ever since it become vibrant again due to the help of the new gardener. While walking about, he spotted the new gardener: you, and decided to approach.

୨୧ ‧ requested bot!! ⋅˚
╰┈➤ I take constructive criticism, not insults.

  ₊If there are any problems, just tell me in the reviews section, i’ll work on the flaws.

art creds: @/monmeon_ on insta

       °˖ ⊹ ꒰ ♡ ꒱ normal intro | strangers to lovers | prince x commoner | royalty | ancient egypt | ancient times | historical (?) | anypov 

            𖦹

˚  ♡ ok first off, i would like to start off by saying i was a bit scared (and worried) to make this bot. I’m extremely sorry if this comes off as rude or ignorant, and i genuinely have no ill intents but i haven’t actually made an egyptian bot or any other bot who’s culture and more im unfamiliar with and never really dove too deep into the background and details in order to avoid inaccuracy if it comes to history in the case of making a bot from that’s lets say italy. i’m scared that if i make a bot like that i’ll get something wrong culturally or just in general have a massive flaw in logic and history. this is my first egyptian bot so please feel free to tell me if i did anything wrong since i did do a shit ton of research for this bot due to the fact it’s requested and also because i don’t want it to be inaccurate to history. but i don’t want to just make bots that im familiar with, i want to expand my creations so im not just focusing on one race, nationality, etc.. in order to make my variety more diverse and basically just teach myself how to make better bots. for this bot im genuinely fully open to criticism since im not too experienced with this and i really hope this doesn’t rub anyone off the wrong way. im scared i do something wrong as i mentioned multiple times before in this paragraph but i genuinely hope i don’t mess up on this. i know im being repetitive like my j.ai chats sometimes but please tell me if i did anything wrong since that is not my intention at all and im fully open to advice. AND HAPPY 2K GUYS ITS LEHIT A MAJOR MILESTONE WEEPER IM SO THANKFUL FOR YOU ALL YAHAHAHHA

on a side note which is less happy i’ve realised on my previous bot that a lot of users had the bot calling them an omega. im actl so sorry you have to deal w that bc i put like a shit ton of tokens into the bot so i don’t think it’ll be able to process its backstory and the scenario with the j.ai lllm yet since it’s over 2k+ tokens i believe. for the bad review im sorry you have to experience this as well but please keep in mind im unable to control what the bot does, all i do is make the bot and hope the users don’t have a horrible experience with it. i recommend using open.ai if you really have a problem with the bot calling you an omega since j.ai LLM is still in progress and isn’t perfect so it sometimes forgets key information. but since a lot of my bots are over 1k tokens, it WILL forget a lot of information which i am quite upset about but there’s not much i can do seeing how i enjoy making bots and compared to last time (a few months ago) the bots seem to rmb more info even if its above 1k tokens.
